original_text: On the other side of the fence, I owned a Bieffe off-road helmet. Took what I would consider a minor fall, and had visible damage to the shell. Yes, the helmet did its job. But the damage/impact ratio was scary. My recommendation is to buy _high_ quality gear. YMMV. -mark

Cd for cars is usually calculated based on the frontal area of the car. So a large car with a good Cd could get the same drag force as a smaller car with a poorer Cd.
